text:
Koenji Demonstrates His Overwhelming Superiority | Classroom of the Elite Season 4
Koenji takes down an entire classroom in episode 14! Watch Classroom of the Elite on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-cote4

ABOUT CLASSROOM OF THE ELITE
Kiyotaka Ayanokoji has just enrolled at Tokyo Koudo Ikusei Senior High School, where it's said that 100% of students go on to college or find employment. But he ends up in Class 1-D, which is full of all the school's problem children.

What's more, every month, the school awards students points with a cash value of 100,000 yen, and the classes employ a laissez-faire policy in which talking, sleeping, and even sabotage are permitted during class.

One month later, Ayanokoji, Horikita, and the students of Class D learn the truth of the system in place within their school...

text:
Meili's Past | Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- Season 4
Subaru witness's Meili's origin in episode 10! Watch Re:ZERO on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-rezero4

ABOUT RE:ZERO
Natsuki Subaru, an ordinary high school student, is on his way home from the convenience store when he finds himself transported to another world. As he's lost and confused in a new world where he doesn't even know left from right, the only person to reach out to him was a beautiful girl with silver hair. Determined to repay her somehow for saving him from his own despair, Subaru agrees to help the girl find something she's looking for...

Episode 12: What was he going to say?! Watch Go For It, Nakamura-kun!! on Crunchyroll! https://got.cr/cc-gfink

ABOUT GO FOR IT, NAKAMURA-KUN!!
Love at first sight is no myth—just ask Okuto Nakamura. Whenever his dreamy classmate Aiki Hirose enters the room, his heart skips a beat, despite the fact that they’ve never actually spoken. Not to mention, Nakamura is a complete klutz with zero friends. Will he ruin his chance at love before it even begins?

author: Crunchyroll YouTube
text:
Mami Is Fake as Hell | Rent-a-Girlfriend Season 5
Episode 3: To be honest, about time. Watch Rent-a-Girlfriend on Crunchyroll!: https://got.cr/cc-rag

ABOUT RENT-A-GIRLFRIEND
Kinoshita Kazuya is a 20-year-old failure of a college student. He managed to kiss his girlfriend once, but was dumped after a month. "Ugh... Damn it. I never want to go through that again."

Completely spiteful, Kazuya uses a certain method to date a girl. He goes to their meeting place and suddenly hears, "You're Kazuya-kun, right?" A beautiful girl brushing her long, black hair behind her ear was there, smiling at him. Her name was Mizuhara Chizuru. Something real is born after just a single rental! A reckless rom-com filled with love and excitement is about to begin!

author: Crunchyroll YouTube
text:
Though I Am an Inept Villainess | Official Trailer 2 | Crunchyroll
Though I Am an Inept Villainess is coming to Crunchyroll July 14th!

ABOUT THOUGHT I AM AN INEPT VILLAINESS
As maidens from the Five Clans battle for the Crown Prince’s heart, jealous Keigetsu uses forbidden magic to swap bodies with the beloved Reirin. Switching places does not guarantee happiness for Keigetsu with her new body's ill health leaving her hanging on the verge of death. Meanwhile, Reirin, now wearing the face of a scorned outcast, must answer for Keigetsu’s crimes in a dangerous trial.

The unlikely pair become increasingly entangled in each other’s lives and they will need to work together to survive after discovering the dark conspiracies brewing beneath the palace's genial surface. To confront the deadly threats lurking in the shadows, Reirin must embrace her new identity and defy their expectations of the court's inept villainess.
